message:
feat(tui,cli): screen manager refactoring and output formatting improvements

Major TUI architecture refactoring and CLI output enhancements:

tui_app.rs:
- Extract ScreenManager struct for encapsulating screen instances
- Implement lazy screen loading with ensure_screen()
- Add active screen routing and navigation helpers
- Centralize deep link handling in apply_deep_link()

tui_screens/system_health.rs:
- Enhanced system health dashboard metrics
- Improved visualization of health indicators

tui_events.rs:
- New event handling module for TUI interactions
- Structured event processing pipeline

tui_poller.rs:
- Extended polling infrastructure for real-time updates
- Better async coordination with state updates

cli/output.rs:
- New output formatting module for CLI responses
- Structured output helpers for consistent formatting

cli/lib.rs:
- Refactored command handling to use new output module
- Improved error message formatting

core/models.rs:
- Extended model definitions for TUI state management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
